Choose WWSP as your non-profit of choice!
Directions to 90FM
We are located on Reserve Street, in the Communications Arts Center. The studios are on the first floor. If you are to the North, or South, this is how you get there. If you are on I39, Highway 51, exit at the Highway 10 exit toward Stevens Point. You will be heading west. Now look at the next set of directions.
From the East, take Highway 10 West. You will cross the Interstate. At this point, you go to the sixth stop light and turn right. This is about 2 and one-half miles. At the second street, Briggs Street, turn right. Drive 2 blocks, and the Communications Arts Center is in front of you. On your left, the north side of the building, there is an entrance. That is 90FM.
From the West, take Highway 10 east, over the Wisconsin River Bridge. At the fourth stop light, turn left. At the third street, Briggs Street, turn right. Drive 2 blocks, and the Communications Arts Center is in front of you. On your left, the north side of the building, there is an entrance. That is 90FM.
The telephone number of the station is 715-346-3755. Because the executive staff is comprised of students, the office is often not staffed. Please leave a message. We hope this helps.

Welcome to the Trivia website. If you have any questions, please feel free to email me, I'll give you an answer.
The address is theoz@dwave.net.
The Trivia Forum has been inactive and has been closed down. Still want to put in your 2 cents? Go to Facebook and like us!
There is plenty going on there. Need a team to join, post that on Facebook as well!
